<UIForeground>F201FC</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FD</UIGlow> Quest Sync<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
Tazel Meyean the Lettered has need of a versatile adventurer to reclaim stolen materials and craft them into balloon components.
※The crafting portion of this quest is recommended for Disciples of the Hand level 10 and above, and the battle portion for Disciples of War or Magic level 47 and above.

<UIForeground>F201FC</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FD</UIGlow> Quest Sync<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
Tazel Meyean the Lettered has need of a versatile adventurer to reclaim stolen materials and craft them into balloon components.
※The crafting portion of this quest is recommended for Disciples of the Hand level 10 and above, and the battle portion for Disciples of War or Magic level 47 and above.

1:
Tazel Meyean had intended to ask you to craft high-quality transmission components for the <Emphasis>Dezul Qualan</Emphasis>. Alas, the materials required for their synthesis have been stolen by a band of Qiqirn. Speak with Miah Molkot at Eugenia's Spire to learn where the vile vermin may have fled.

※Please note that the difficulty of this quest has been synced to your current level.

4:
Hildeyerd has prepared the crafting facility for your use. With the materials you have obtained, synthesize two high-quality transmission components, and deliver them to Tazel Meyean at Ehcatl.

※In the event that the status <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Facility Access: Detailing<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> wears off or the synthesis ends in failure, you may try again by speaking with Hildeyerd.
